text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka is at the library for a tutoring
session with Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I need some fresh air. Would it be all right if
I take a quick run?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You're not getting out of here that easily. How
can I be certain you won't simply run off and
never return?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You have a test soon. You'll never be finished
with this mountain of books if you don't get to
work.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Mountain...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
A nice mountain run is exactly what I need right
about now.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: H-huh? Where am I? Air Groove?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: She's gone...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: That means it's time to...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Go!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Amazing! I can't even see the peak of this
mountain.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Which means... I can run as far as I want!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe!
...uka!
Suzuka! Hey, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? The mountain... just now...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so you have been listening? Good. As I was
saying, it's important to memorize the names of
these mountains and rivers.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove, listen! Just now, I was running up a
mountain and... it was so tall I couldn't see the
top—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: So you were sleeping after all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, I notice a remarkable improvement in
Silence Suzuka's running.
